# InnoTech Technologies

> Precision laboratory equipment supplier serving 500+ research institutions across the United States and 30+ countries since 2014. Headquartered in Lenexa, Kansas. ISO 9001 certified. 24/7 US-based technical support.

## About

InnoTech Technologies is a US-based supplier of certified laboratory equipment for research institutions, hospitals, biotech, and pharmaceutical companies. We provide precision instruments backed by full documentation, on-site installation, calibration, and dedicated technical support.

- **Founded**: 2014
- **Headquarters**: Lenexa, Kansas, United States (66215)
- **Phone**: +1 (818) 943-1786
- **Sales**: sales@innotechtechnologies.us
- **Support**: info@innotechtechnologies.us
- **Hours**: Monday–Friday, 8 AM – 6 PM EST (24/7 emergency technical support)

## Certifications

- ISO 9001 — Quality Management
- CE Marked — European Conformity
- FDA Compliant — US Regulatory
- IEC Standards — Electrical Safety

## Product Categories

- **Centrifugation**: Micro centrifuges, refrigerated centrifuges, high-speed centrifuges
- **Cold Storage**: -86°C ultra-low freezers, -40°C freezers, lab refrigerators, chillers
- **Sterilization**: Autoclaves, biosafety cabinets, laminar flow hoods, fume hoods, PCR cabinets
- **Spectroscopy**: Single-beam and double-beam UV-Vis spectrophotometers
- **Measurement**: pH meters, conductivity meters, DO meters, flame photometers
- **Cryogenics**: Liquid nitrogen containers (10 L, 35 L, 50 L)
- **Incubation**: Incubators, CO2 incubators, plant growth chambers
- **Sample Preparation**: Vortex mixers, stirrers, hot plates, heat blocks, shakers, sonicators

## Services

1. **Equipment Supply** — OEM-direct sourcing with genuine parts and competitive pricing.
2. **Installation & Setup** — On-site installation, calibration, and IQ/OQ/PQ validation by certified field engineers.
3. **Calibration & Validation** — Routine calibration with full ISO traceability, annual contracts, loaner units.
4. **Maintenance & Repair** — 24/7 technical support and 48-hour emergency dispatch.
5. **Training Programs** — Hands-on operator training and certification.
6. **OEM Partnerships** — Authorized resale, warranty support, technical updates from leading manufacturers.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Where is InnoTech Technologies based?**
Headquartered in Lenexa, Kansas, USA, with worldwide shipping and regional service engineers across the United States.

**What is your typical delivery timeframe?**
Standard US delivery is 5–10 business days. Emergency dispatch is available within 48 hours. International shipping varies by destination.

**Are your products certified?**
Yes. All equipment ships with full documentation including ISO 9001, CE, and FDA compliance where applicable. Audit-ready paperwork is included with every shipment.

**Do you offer installation and training?**
Yes. Our certified field engineers provide on-site installation, IQ/OQ/PQ validation, and operator training as part of our service portfolio.

**What is your warranty policy?**
Standard manufacturer warranty applies, with extended warranty plans available. Genuine parts and warranty support are guaranteed through our authorized OEM partnerships.

**How quickly do you respond to inquiries?**
Most quote requests are returned within one business day. Emergency technical support is available 24/7 by phone and email.

**Do you serve international clients?**
Yes — InnoTech serves 500+ institutions across 30+ countries with global logistics and a worldwide service network.

## Key Statistics

- **500+** research institutions served
- **30+** countries shipped to
- **10+** years of expertise (since 2014)
- **150+** partner organizations worldwide
- **98%** client retention rate
